milestones.name: Documentation Foundation
milestones.primary_outcome: The repository contains the engineering standards, architecture foundation, and reusable development rules.

milestones.name: Design System Core
milestones.primary_outcome: A runnable Blazor shell on .NET 10 that renders the design system documentation page. The base primitive components exist and are used by the documentation page.

milestones.name: Architecture Refinement and Project Intelligence
milestones.primary_outcome: Strengthen the long-term engineering foundation: introduce VISION.md, the engineering backlog, structured state, decision log, capability mapping, dashboard definition, self-awareness state, and the dogfooding evolution. Validate the documentation architecture.

milestones.name: Application Shell and Navigation
milestones.primary_outcome: The shell has a sidebar, a top bar, and a content panel. The platform is navigable; every navigation target renders an empty state that uses the design system.

M2.1.title: Application Shell Foundation
M2.1.summary: Two layouts (AppLayout, AppEmptyLayout), two placeholder shell components (AppSidebarSlot, AppTopBarSlot), one presentational helper (AppShellRegion). The M1.1 chrome is retired. 25 new bUnit tests ship; 102 total component tests pass.

M2.2.title: Navigation Registry and Sidebar
M2.2.summary: INavigationRegistry, RouteMetadata, RouteMetadataAttribute, RouteRegistry in src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Navigation/; ServiceCollectionExtensions + NavigationServiceCollectionExtensions in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Composition/; AppSidebar, AppSidebarItem, AppNavItem in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Navigation/; [RouteMetadata] applied to all 6 pages; AppSidebarSlot and AppSidebarSlotTests deleted; AppLayout wired to AppSidebar; Pages_AreReachable_Through_Registry architecture test active and green. 28 new bUnit/integration tests + 1 new architecture test added.
M2.2.commit_message: feat(m2.2): add navigation registry and sidebar

M2.3.title: Top Bar, Breadcrumbs, and Page Headers
M2.3.summary: AppTopBar (replaces AppTopBarSlot), AppThemeToggle (relocated from M1.1 chrome), AppUserAvatarSlot, AppBreadcrumb in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/. AppBreadcrumb wired into AppPageHeader.Breadcrumbs on DesignSystem.razor. AppTopBarSlot and AppTopBarSlotTests deleted; AppLayout wired to AppTopBar. 27 new bUnit tests across 4 test files; 6 obsolete AppTopBarSlotTests removed; 146 total component tests pass. Two documented deviations: (1) AppTopBar uses div.app-topbar + Leading/Trailing slots rather than AppStack + AppPageHeader; the surface still composes AppTopBar + AppPageHeader + AppBreadcrumb, matching the plan's intent. (2) Optional architecture test Breadcrumb_Follows_Registry_Parent_Chain was skipped per plan § 8 step 11 which marked it optional.
M2.3.commit_message: feat(m2.3): add top bar, breadcrumb, and page header integration

M2.4.title: Project Intelligence Dashboard
M2.4.summary: IProjectIntelligenceReader + ProjectIntelligenceSnapshot + ProjectIntelligenceReader in src/AiEng.Platform.Application/ProjectIntelligence/; ProjectIntelligenceServiceCollectionExtensions in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Composition/; Dashboard.razor + Dashboard.razor.css in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Pages/; theme toggle bug fixed (added appTheme.current JS function, IsDark updated synchronously before JSInterop, JSDisconnectedException handled); 6 unit + 13 bUnit + 2 architecture tests added (175 total passing). Architecture test Pages_Resolve_State_Through_Reader confirms the Dashboard consumes state only through IProjectIntelligenceReader.

M2.5.title: Empty Routes, Responsive, and Accessibility
M2.5.summary: Five sub-deliverables: (1) Empty routes — Home.razor and NotFound.razor rewritten to use AppCard + AppEmptyState with links to /dashboard and /design-system. (2) Responsive matrix — AppLayout.razor.css has @media rules for the lg / md / sm breakpoints (14rem / 10rem / 8rem sidebar widths); content area gets overflow-y: auto; topbar remains horizontal; docs/ui-principles.md § 10.1 documents the matrix. (3) A11y audit — KeyboardSmokeTests (4 tests), AriaCurrentInvariantTests (5 tests covering breadcrumb aria-current, NavLink active state, sidebar active link), AxeCoreAuditTests (3 tests registered but skipped per ADR-016 / M4-D). (4) T-017 theme toggle fix — @rendermode InteractiveServer added to AppThemeToggle.razor (not to AppLayout.razor; the layout's @Body is a RenderFragment delegate, which Blazor refuses to serialize across the SSR → interactive boundary); the new AppLayout_ThemeToggleWiringTests bUnit test renders the AppLayout, finds the toggle inside the topbar, clicks it, and asserts appTheme.set is invoked. (5) Project-continuity state + implementation report + per-session handoff. 18 new component tests + 3 new architecture tests (skipped) added. Total: 197 passing + 7 skipped, 0 failed (6 unit + 185 bUnit + 6 active architecture + 7 registered-but-disabled).
M2.5.commit_message: feat(m2.5): add empty routes, responsive matrix, a11y audit, and theme toggle fix

milestones.name: Project Registration
milestones.primary_outcome: A user can register a project (a folder on disk) and the platform owns a Project entity in the application layer.

milestones.name: Infrastructure / Process Execution
milestones.primary_outcome: AiEng.Platform.Infrastructure is created. IProcessRunner, ICredentialVault, IClock, and the on-disk IProjectStore land. M3 in-memory store is replaced.

milestones.name: Capability Detection
milestones.primary_outcome: The host detects git, ollama, powershell.exe, wsl.exe, wt.exe, bash.exe through IProcessRunner and produces a typed HostCapabilities report.

milestones.name: Provider Registry Foundation
milestones.primary_outcome: IProviderRegistry and the family-scoped registries are introduced with fake providers; the composition root pattern is in place.

milestones.name: First Concrete Process Providers
milestones.primary_outcome: GitProvider and OllamaLaunchProvider land as concrete process-boundary providers; the contract test framework is established; the four composition-root architecture tests activate; the No_DirectProcessStart_OutsideInfrastructure test activates.

milestones.name: Native Git Worktrees
milestones.primary_outcome: A user can create a native Git worktree from a registered project; the worktree is the unit of work for later milestones.

milestones.name: Agent Runtime Launching
milestones.primary_outcome: A user can launch an agent runtime against a registered project's worktree; the launch is cancellable mid-stream; the terminal output is rendered; the execution history is persisted.

milestones.name: Review and Quality Gates
milestones.primary_outcome: A launched run can be reviewed (IReviewProvider) and gated (IQualityGateProvider). The native baselines are the first implementations; external tools (Lavish Axi, No Mistakes) are added through the registry when the user opts in.

milestones.name: Autonomous Loops, Orchestration, Production Hardening
milestones.primary_outcome: The platform ships its remaining provider families (IAutonomousLoopProvider, IOrchestrationProvider) through native baselines, and the production-hardening work lands.
